name: Support suite template
description: Starter release-gate suite for customer support refund and escalation wording.

cases.name: Safe support wording emits
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be approved by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes require review by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Refunds under 75 GBP may be approved by support staff. Escalated billing disputes require review by a human support lead.

cases.name: Refund threshold drift blocks
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be approved by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes require review by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: Refunds under 250 GBP may be approved by support staff.
